description: The 14 operational domains NIRVA RESEARCH covers. `priority` reflects BEST Group pilot relevance (core = the three service lines + the workforce/payroll spine that runs them). `standards` and `controls` reference standards_kb; `nirva_modules` reference the NirvaCore/NirvaGov modules in nirva_os. `thai_context` captures the key local-law touchpoint.

domains.name: Cleaning Services
domains.thai_context: Labour-intensive, high turnover; outsourced-service VAT 7% + 3% WHT on service fees; site-based SLA contracts.

domains.name: Security Services
domains.thai_context: Guards licensed under พ.ร.บ.ธุรกิจรักษาความปลอดภัย 2558 (Security Business Act); CCTV triggers PDPA.

domains.name: Facility Management
domains.thai_context: PPM contracts; building safety law; electrical/lift permits; energy reporting.

domains.name: Workforce Management
domains.thai_context: Shift-based deskless workforce across 256+ sites; required-vs-actual headcount tied to client SLA.

domains.name: Payroll
domains.thai_context: LPA 2541 (OT 1.5x/3x), Social Security 5% (cap base 15,000), WHT PND.1, provident fund optional.

domains.name: Human Resources
domains.thai_context: Employment contracts in Thai; work rules (ข้อบังคับ) required >10 staff; foreign-worker permits (กรมการจัดหางาน).

domains.name: Procurement
domains.thai_context: Vendor WHT 3% (services)/1% (transport); supplier บัญชีผู้ค้า; anti-bribery exposure on tenders.

domains.name: Accounting
domains.thai_context: TFRS/TFRS for NPAEs; e-Tax invoice/e-Receipt (RD); PND.50/51 corporate, PP.30 VAT monthly.

domains.name: Customer Experience
domains.thai_context: Complaints often via LINE; SLA penalties; CSAT drives contract renewals.

domains.name: ISO Standards
domains.thai_context: Certification via accredited bodies (NAC/สมอ.); surveillance audits annual; tender prerequisite.

domains.name: Legal Compliance
domains.thai_context: Labour law, commercial contracts, security-business licensing, building/fire codes.

domains.name: PDPA / Privacy
domains.thai_context: PDPA B.E. 2562 fully in force 2022; fines to ฿5M + criminal; biometric = sensitive data needing explicit consent.

domains.name: Tax
domains.thai_context: VAT 7%; WHT 3% services; PND.1/3/53/50/51; PP.30; SSO; e-Tax invoice. Rates change — verify with RD.

domains.name: AI Strategy
domains.thai_context: No standalone AI law yet; governed by PDPA + ISO 42001 voluntarily; ETDA AI guidelines emerging.
